steps: Log in with your Facebook account or create one
Click 'Create App' and select 'Business' as the app type
Enter your app name and contact email, then click 'Create App'
In the app dashboard, click 'Add Product' and add 'Instagram Graph API'
Navigate to 'App Settings' > 'Basic' to find your App ID (client_id) and App Secret (client_secret)
Click 'Show' next to App Secret and confirm your password to reveal it
Set your app to 'Live' mode when ready to use with real accounts

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: App ID
credential_fields.description: Your Facebook App ID (found in App Settings > Basic)

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: App Secret
credential_fields.description: Your Facebook App Secret (found in App Settings > Basic)

notes: Requires a Facebook Business account or developer account
App must be in 'Live' mode to access other users' accounts; use 'Development' mode for testing with your own account
Instagram accounts must be Business or Creator accounts connected to a Facebook Page
Access tokens expire after 60 days; use long-lived tokens for production
App review may be required for certain permissions (e.g., instagram_manage_insights)
The base URL used is https://graph.facebook.com/v21.0, not api.instagram.com

test_endpoint.description: Returns the authenticated user's Facebook ID and name (requires a valid access token)
